notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Henry Davis out at 2nd. Oneil Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales reaches on a throwing error by shortstop David Hamilton. Ryan O'Hearn to 2nd.
